summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Project Atlas banking platform. Tested customer dashboard (overview, 4 tiles, P2P transfers, beneficiaries, scheduled payments, spending insights), admin dashboard (sidebar with 10 menu items, analytics with charts, users table, KYC review, ledger tools), and mobile responsiveness. Fixed critical AdminUsersTable component bug. Backend: 88.2% success rate (15/17 tests passed). Frontend: All major features working with professional UI (solid white, red accent).

critical_bugs.issue: Returns 500 Internal Server Error when creating scheduled payment
critical_bugs.root_cause: ScheduledPayment schema uses ObjectId() which is not JSON serializable. System requirement states: 'DO NOT USE MONGO ObjectID, use UUIDs instead'
critical_bugs.error_details: bson.errors.InvalidId or serialization error when inserting document with ObjectId

expected_failures.reason: Admin user doesn't have a bank account created
expected_failures.impact: Expected behavior - P2P transfers require both users to have accounts

critical_bugs_fixed.issue: AdminUsersTable component was referenced but not defined/imported
critical_bugs_fixed.symptoms: Admin dashboard crashed with 'ReferenceError: AdminUsersTable is not defined'
critical_bugs_fixed.fix_applied: Created AdminUsersTable component inline in App.js with proper table structure

passed_tests: Customer login with professional UI (solid white, red accent)
Customer dashboard overview card with €1,027.54 balance display
4 stat tiles visible (Accounts: 1, Cards: 0, Transfers: 5, Statements: 0)
P2P transfer form present on dashboard
Beneficiaries section with Add Recipient button
Scheduled Payments section with Schedule Payment button
Spending Insights with pie chart showing 5 categories (€1000 total)
Account balance display correct
Transaction history showing 17 transactions
Admin login successful
Admin sidebar shows 10 menu items (Overview, Users, KYC Queue, Accounts, Ledger Tools, Transactions, Support Tickets, Audit Logs, Settings, Logout)
Admin analytics dashboard with 4 charts (User Growth, Monthly Transactions, User Status, KYC Status)
Admin users table showing 6 users with search/filter functionality
Admin user details loads when clicked
Admin KYC review section accessible
Admin ledger tools section accessible
Mobile bottom tabs visible (Home, Accounts, Activity, Profile)
No gradients - solid white backgrounds confirmed
Red accent color (#D32F2F / rgb(211, 47, 47)) on buttons confirmed
Toast notifications working (no alerts)
Backend health check passing
Beneficiaries API working (add/list)
Spending insights API returning category breakdown

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 critical bug fixed, 1 backend-dependent feature failing)

critical: Fix ScheduledPayment schema in /app/backend/schemas/advanced.py - Replace ObjectId() with UUID string generation. Change line: 'id: str = Field(default_factory=lambda: str(ObjectId()), alias="_id")' to 'id: str = Field(default_factory=lambda: str(uuid.uuid4()), alias="_id")'
high: Verify AdminUsersTable component fix is correct and matches design requirements
Create bank account for admin@atlas.local user to enable P2P transfer testing
medium: Review all schemas for ObjectId usage and replace with UUID (Beneficiary schema also uses ObjectId)
notes: Sidebar has 10 items instead of specified 9 (includes Settings) - this is acceptable
All ObjectId issues should be resolved as per system requirements
KYC status shows 'REJECTED' for demo customer - may want to set to 'APPROVED' for better demo experience
